title: Deadliest
description: Ranked by the lowest reported oral LD50. The smaller the lethal dose per kilogram of body weight, the deadlier. Animal data shown as neutral science: an estimate, never a threshold to act on.

title: Sweetest
description: Ranked by sweetness relative to table sugar (sucrose = 1×).

title: Most pungent
description: Ranked by Scoville heat units, the pungency of the pure compound: from capsaicin's chili-pepper fire down to the milder bite of piperine in black pepper.

title: Biggest
description: Ranked by molecular weight: the heaviest molecules in the canon.
